What is a mail order bride?
So, who are mail order brides? These are girls who seek love and happiness online. These are women who want to meet a man who is kind, responsible, and mature. A mail order bride has nothing to do with illegal activity—these are not escorts or prostitutes. Women who become mail order brides are ladies who decided to look for a life partner in different countries. The reasons for such an action could be different, but we know for sure that mail order brides seek love and happiness in serious relationships. You can order a bride online by using a dating site—it is easy and simple!
✅ Is mail order brides legal? Yes

What statistics on international marriages say
The most popular places for online communication are the following: Asia, Latin America, and Eastern Europe. The Philippines is the country with the most mail order brides—over 7 thousand brides came from this country in 2019. Eastern Europe is also a very popular place for looking for serious relationships—thousands of Russian and Ukrainian brides come to the United States every year to marry local guys.
Why are foreign women looking for foreign husbands online?
The answer to this question is rather complex and differs from one bride to another. However, in most cases, it’s a combination of three factors:
Attraction to Western men, admiration for their personality traits, and being able to easily imagine marriage to one of them.
Desire to create a better future for themselves and their future children in a foreign country with more opportunities than their home country can provide.
Dissatisfaction with the state of dating in their own city or country, where men often have issues with commitment or are unwilling to provide for their families.
All of these factors compel a typical mail order wife to look for a husband online using a mail order bride agency. Of course, she can also have her own reasons for doing it, but you can always talk about it once you meet her.

How to know when you need to find a wife online?
Before you begin looking for a wife to marry, you need to make sure that that’s what you really want. Your dream of marrying a foreign bride is completely understandable, and there are many good reasons to do it. However, you should also be completely informed about every aspect of this union.
 We want you to not only know the basic things about building an international relationship or marriage, like what is a bride and what kind of wives for sale are out there. We also want you to make a fully informed decision. Here are three questions you need to answer before you decide to purchase a wife:
Am I prepared to make the first move, as an internet bride is usually too shy and traditional to reach out first?
Is it okay for me if my partner will be completely devoted to me and will never leave my side?
Am I cool with the role of a leader in my future relationship and especially marriage?
If you’ve answered “Yes” to two or more questions, it means you are ready to meet wives dating online. Continue reading our article to find out where to search for a wife for sale and choose your ideal platform to buy a wife.
How expensive is it to find a bride?
However, it is important to know that meeting with a date in real life can be rather expensive. You can spend around $100 per month on online communication, but eventually, you will need to have a real-life date with your woman. Depending on where your best mail order brides come from, the overall cost of such a real-life meeting can be around $2,000–$5,000.

How long does it usually take to find a mail order wife?
There is no standard answer to this question because the exact length of your online dating period can depend on several factors. How often you visit the mail order bride website, how many women you communicate with at once, and even how good you are with ladies in general are all important factors to consider.
At the same time, there have been enough men before you who successfully found their wives online, so now we have some data to operate with. On average, men say that it takes them between 6 and 18 months to go from signing up for a popular dating website to finally proposing to their future wife. So even if you’ve spent a year dating online and still haven’t found one, there is still plenty of time!
Is it okay to look for a web mail order wife?
It absolutely is! In this day and age, there is no right or wrong way to look for a life partner. Everyone is simply doing whatever is more comfortable and preferable to them. If you are convinced that a specific type of foreign woman is exactly who you need as a wife, then looking for your future spouse online is the smartest thing to do. And anyone who says otherwise probably wishes that finding a wife was that easy for them.
FIND YOUR BELOVED
HERE'S YOUR CHANCE!
A few reasons why marrying a foreigner is the best option to end loneliness
Indeed, when people from two different cultures start a relationship, it is easier for them to find compromises. Differences in cultures are both good and bad, as they can create obstacles for understanding but also offer a different perspective on a certain problem. Another reason why marrying a foreigner is the best option to end loneliness is because you can learn so many new things by just being with a person you love. You can have lengthy conversations about the customs and traditions of another country. You can broaden your mind by simply being with a woman you date.
Even though there are thousands of men in the USA who dream about meeting foreign women, the attraction to foreign ladies isn’t always that easy to explain. So why do so many guys want to find a wife online, free or paid, and why should you consider it as well? Here are 5 reasons why it’s such a fantastic option.
You get to be with the most loyal woman. Foreign brides are looking for a partner for life, not just a fun fling or a no-strings-attached situation.
You can focus on what’s important. To an internet wife, it doesn’t matter how successful you are or how much you make. She loves you for who you are.
You get a family you’ve always wanted. Unlike Western girls, women in foreign countries don’t usually put off having children, so your family will start growing right away.
Your family will get twice as big. Not only do you get a wife and kids in the future, but you also get the support of your wife’s side of the family, who will accept you like you’re their son, if that’s what you actually want. If not, having your in-laws live in a different country can also be beneficial for your marriage.
You can broaden your horizons. Being married to a foreign lady means constantly learning about her culture, and mastering another language also never hurts.
Legal aspects of marrying a foreign bride
As mentioned above, mail order bride services are legal and moral. Women are not forced to do anything they don’t like. If a girl wants to stop dating a man online, she can do it without stating a reason. Furthermore, the legality of online communication is ensured through the International Marriage Broker Regulation Act and The Violence Against Women Act—these two documents protect women from and ensure that men who want to buy a mail order bride are decent and not abusive. And don’t forget, you cannot buy a bride online. You merely pay for online communication by using legit mail order brides sites.
CHECKED AND RELIABLE MAIL ORDER BRIDE SITES →
Advantages of looking for a foreign wife online
So, why should you care about buying a bride online? This form of communication and relationships is characterized by a couple of benefits. Let’s take a closer look at what makes the process of buying a foreign wife so appealing!
It is safe
As we have mentioned above, the industry is regulated by several laws that ensure that such relationships are formed based on love. If you decide to use a decent and respectable site, you can be sure that your personal data and information about your foreign brides will remain safe and secured.
It is cheap
Having a real-life date is usually a rather expensive thing – restaurants, presents, movie tickets, and other expenses can sum up to several thousand dollars a month. Online dating, on the other hand, doesn’t require you to spend nearly as much to succeed. Sure, you will have to pay for communication on dating sites. Yet average monthly expenses would rarely exceed $100-$300 per month, while you will enjoy hundreds, if not thousands, of beautiful mail order brides.
It is convenient
Mail order sites are designed to minimize actions needed to unite a single man from the United States with a single woman from some foreign country. Just a few things are between you and your potential future overseas wife. Learning about dating sites is easy and doesn’t require you to spend too much time.
It is popular
Lastly, buying a bride online is a rather popular thing to do nowadays. A lot of girls from Asia, Slavic countries, South America, and other regions know that there is a high demand for beautiful, loyal, and family-oriented women in the United States. Thus, the number of mail order wives increases every single month, allowing you to enjoy an exceptional diversity of beauties all over the world.
Top 5 misconceptions about mail order wives and men who marry them
Internet dating and mail order marriages have been around long enough for millions of people to know about them. Needless to say, they have also been controversial to a degree. Here are 5 myths and misconceptions about mail order wives and their admirers and why they are untrue.
Men who marry mail order wives are simply desperate. In reality, a mail order marriage is typically far from being the only option for the man who chooses it. However, it’s definitely the fastest and the easiest way to meet the woman who matches his criteria of an ideal partner.
There is usually a big age gap in these marriages. The most common image of a mail order marriage is a very young bride and a groom in his forties or fifties, but that is far from reality. Sure, many mail order women are in their twenties or early thirties, but there are plenty of women in their forties or even fifties. Similarly, thousands of men looking for foreign brides are under forty or even below thirty.
The women are only doing it for money or a Green Card. There is no arguing with the fact that most real mail order brides view marriage to a foreign man as a way to improve their living conditions. However, there is more to their decision to get married and move abroad than to simply upgrade their quality of living. They mainly do it because they fall in love, not for practical reasons.
A mail order wife will tolerate any treatment just to stay in the country. This stereotype directly results from people believing in the previous myth, and we have already explained why it’s largely untrue. It’s also worth noting that, like Western women, foreign mail order wives have self-respect and demand good treatment from their husbands.
Mail order wives don’t want to work a day in their lives. There are situations where this stereotype is at least partially true. Many foreign brides see themselves as housewives, and they are at their happiest when they can simply take care of the home and the kids. However, many women also want a job and a career and can successfully combine it all with family life.
How to know what kind of an online mail bride you need
When you look at the variety of foreign mail order brides, it’s not uncommon to feel slightly lost. Luckily, we have at least three ways to choose your perfect lady:
Browse our site. We have detailed guides to every popular nationality of mail order wives, so you can instantly find out about the appearance, personality, family values, and other features of the women and compare their characteristics.
Think of your favorite celebrities. Over the years, you have probably had lots of celebrity crushes. Simply consider the nationality and ethnicity you fall for most frequently. Is it European, Asian, or Latin women? Use this knowledge to find your bride!
Take a quiz. Our online quiz is perfect when you already know what kind of woman you want to meet but don’t know where to go to make it happen.

Barrett Connell
MailOrderBridesAgency Expert
So what do you need to do to buy a bride? Honestly, the whole process isn’t difficult. You just need to follow this simple instruction, that’s all! Let’s take a look at what you need to do to find and buy a real wife!

Create an account and profile. A standard procedure for almost any dating platform. It will not take a lot of time.
Start looking for a potential date. Here is where your journey actually begins. To buy a bride means to find an ideal woman for you.
Buy premium membership or credits. Based on what type of site you choose, you will have to spend some money to actually interact and chat with foreign brides. While there might be free dating sites, we don’t recommend using them as they might be scams.
Have fun with your dates. The goal of online communication is to have fun. You need to enjoy your dates with mail order brides.
After spending some time, ask your date to become your wife if you have no problems with her.
It is important to note that buying a bride and getting her to the United States can be rather challenging as it requires a lot of documents. We will cover this issue later in the article, though!
How to choose your ideal dating service
There are many important choices you’ll need to make when looking for a bride for sale, from the ethnicity and nationality you like to where you are going to live once you get married. However, in every case, your journey starts on a dating platform, so your choice of a site matters as well. Here are the features to consider when searching for your perfect dating service:
Size and quality of the audience. You need to have enough potential partners to be able to score a match, and the women you meet should be 100% real.
Design and mobile functionality. A solid, user-friendly design and a comprehensive mobile version or even a mobile app are essential for your satisfaction.
Reputation. Always research a site before chatting on it or, better yet, check out our reviews to find out which dating services can be fully trusted.
Openness. A trustworthy dating site will never keep the identity of its authors, its address, legal information, and other essential data a secret.
Privacy and support. You need to make sure that the website will keep your personal data secure by checking its privacy policy. Customer support is also important.

Challenges that you may face while buying a mail order brides online
While online communication is rather simple and straightforward, you still may face some challenges along the way. We want to help you get ready and find the best solutions to those challenges in advance.
Poor communication skills
First of all, your dating skills might be a bit rusty. To have fluent and interesting conversations with your potential mail order wives, try researching a few things about their countries and culture – such information can help find topics for discussion. Also, remember to always be polite and respectful.
Language barrier
The fact that you can find a mail order bride from a different country is wonderful. However, it also brings the problems of miscommunication and misunderstanding. Even though most overseas brides learn English to find a husband, sometimes their English can be rather poor. You just need to be ready for potential barriers.
Documents required to bring your date to the United States
This is probably the most common issue that most men face. After successfully finding the love of your life, a lot of guys realize that a lot of bureaucratic issues have to be dealt with. You have two options while deciding to get married to a foreign bride. First, you can marry outside of the United States and then apply for a green card through the U.S. embassy. This option involves numerous forms and exams and is rather long.
You can also choose to marry your foreign bride in the United States, which will require a K1 visa for her. However, to get a K1 visa, you need to date for at least 2 years with your lady, which can be rather inconvenient for some people.
Cultural differences
Lastly, you need to understand that mail order brides come from different countries with different cultures.
Barrett Connell
MailOrderBridesAgency Expert
It is very important to learn at least a few things about dating and the family culture of these countries so that you do not say or do something offensive. Moreover, you need to be ready to have some differences in opinion.
